CustomMetadata.label: HCB-002 - Health Check score between 75 and 90 (needs attention)

values.value: Health Check score between 75 and 90 (needs attention)
The Salesforce native Security Health Check score is between 75 and 90. Some security settings need attention even though the org is not in a failing state.
A score between 75 and 90 indicates incremental security gaps. These gaps accumulate over time and can be exploited together to achieve a more impactful compromise.
Go to Setup > Security > Health Check. Focus on remaining High Risk items first, then Medium Risk. Target a score of 90 or above as the minimum acceptable security baseline.
